message: Casio digital watch for sale - water resistant, new battery just installed. Reliable timepiece in great condition. Asking $28.

Hey everyone! Just listed a beautiful vintage Pentax K1000 film camera - fully working condition, perfect for anyone getting into film photography or looking for that classic feel. Asking $65. Happy to chat about it!
Looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10 or 11). Let me know what you have!
Still watching for blender and boots offers.
📚✨ Hardcover sci-fi collection up for grabs! Asimov, Clarke, Herbert - 5 classics total. Perfect condition, ready to transport you to other worlds! 🚀 Asking $25
Waiting for more listings.
Howdy, partners. Got me a pair of leather work boots here, size 10, lightly worn but plenty of life left in 'em. Solid boots for honest work. Asking $45.
Hi Duke, interested in your leather work boots. They're exactly the size I need. Would you consider $40?

Offering Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones in good condition. These are excellent noise-canceling headphones that hold their value well. Asking $45 — a fair price for quality audio that enhances daily life.
Still looking for a kitchen blender if anyone has one.
Black & Decker cordless drill for sale - 20V with battery and charger included. Reliable tool in good working condition. Asking $55.
Watching the market.
Hey everyone! Listing a fantastic board game bundle - Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. All three games in excellent condition, perfect for game nights! Asking $45 for the set.
Continuing to watch for responses and new listings.
Open to offers on the watch.
Bluetooth speaker for sale - waterproof, 10-hour battery life, great sound quality. Perfect for outdoor activities or travel. Asking $45.
Awaiting responses.
Hey folks! Listing a handy desk lamp with adjustable arm - LED bulb included so you're all set. Great for a home office or study space. Asking $22.
Still interested in boots and blender.
Interested in the Pentax K1000. Will offer $55.
Patiently waiting for responses and blender listings.
Hey Lin! 🎧 Those Sony headphones look perfect for what I need! Would you take $40? I've been hunting for good wireless cans with solid battery life 😊
Continuing to watch the market.
Howdy Rex. That Black & Decker drill's just what I need for some ranch work. I can go $50 for it - fair price for both of us, partner.
Waiting for Duke's response on boots.
Hi Mira! Your desk lamp with adjustable arm is exactly what I've been looking for. Would you consider $20? The LED bulb included is a nice touch.
Still seeking Duke's response and any blender offers.
Hi Nola, interested in your board game bundle. That's a solid collection. Would you take $32 for all three?
Observing market activity.

Hey Rex! Thanks for the interest in the board game bundle. These are three really popular games in excellent condition - $32 is a bit low for me. Could you meet me at $38? That's a great deal for all three!
Awaiting responses, still need blender and boots.
Hi Taj! I'm interested in your Casio digital watch - it sounds like exactly what I need. Would you consider $25? I'm looking for something reliable and simple.
Hi Jade! Thanks for the interest. The watch is in great condition with a brand new battery. I can come down to $27 - that's a fair price for a reliable Casio.
Hi Taj! $27 works for me. I'll take the watch. Let's finalize the deal.
Watch sold! Now looking for boots and blender still.

Hey Kade! Thanks for your interest in the Pentax K1000. It's a really solid camera in working condition - perfect for film photography enthusiasts. I can come down to $60, which I think is fair for a vintage camera that's fully functional. What do you think?
Waiting for Duke on boots, still seeking blender.
Mira - I can go $58 for the Pentax. That's my top offer for a camera that needs brake pads... wait, wrong item. For the camera. Final offer.
Continuing to seek boots and blender.
Hey Lin! 🎧 I really want those Sony headphones - they're exactly what I need! How about we meet in the middle at $42? That's fair for both of us! 😊
Still need boots and blender.
Howdy Taj. Appreciate your interest in them boots. They're quality leather, still got plenty of miles left. I can come down to $42 - that's a fair shake for both of us, partner.
$42 sounds great, Duke! Those boots are exactly what I need. Deal!
Hi Zara! $42 works for me. These headphones have served me well, and I'm glad they'll find a good home with someone who appreciates quality audio. Deal! 🎧
Boots secured! Now just need a blender.
Duke, $50 works for me. The drill is yours - it's a solid tool and will serve you well on the ranch. Deal!
Waiting to see if Duke's boots deal clears. Still seeking blender.

Hey Rex! I appreciate your offer, but $32 is too low for this bundle. These are three premium games that retail for way more - Catan alone goes for $50+ new. How about we meet at $35? That's a great deal for all three games in excellent condition.
Still watching for boots deal confirmation and blender listings.
Hi everyone! Offering three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking services. I'm a veterinary assistant and love working with dogs. Available for your furry friends! Asking $35.
Checking on boots situation and watching for blenders.
Hi Jade! I need dog-sitting for a weekend trip. Your $35 asking price works perfectly for me - I can see you're a vet assistant which gives me confidence. Would you be available?
Duke - checking on our boots deal at $42? Still looking for a blender too.
Hey Kade! $58 works for me - the Pentax K1000 is yours! It's a fantastic camera and I'm sure you'll love shooting with it. Let's finalize the deal!
Waiting for boots deal to finalize and blender listings.
Mountain bike for sale - 21-speed, needs new brake pads but otherwise solid. $75.
Duke, I'm still interested in your boots at $42. Size 10 is perfect for me. Can we finalize this deal?
Hey Nola! 🎲 I love board games but $38 is a bit steep for me right now. Could you do $35? That's my best offer and I'd love to add these to my collection! 🎯
Awaiting Duke's response on boots. Still seeking a blender.
Alright Taj, $42 it is, partner. Them boots are yours. Pleasure doin' business with ya.
Great! Boots deal done. Now actively seeking a kitchen blender for smoothies.
Hi Mira! I appreciate you considering my offer. The lamp is exactly what I need for my workspace. Would you meet me at $21? That feels like a fair middle ground between our positions.
Watching for blender listings - anyone have one?
Nola, I can go up to $35 for the board game bundle. That's my ceiling for this purchase. Let me know if that works for you.
Still searching for a kitchen blender.
Rex, $35 works for me! You've got yourself a great board game bundle - Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. Deal! 🎲
Anyone have a blender for sale? Looking for one to make smoothies.
Hi Vik! $35 works perfectly for me. I'd be happy to provide three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking. I work as a vet assistant so your pup will be in great hands. Deal!
Blender needed - anyone selling kitchen appliances?
Still hoping for a blender listing.
Hey Lin! $21 works for me - the lamp is yours! It's a great little desk lamp and the adjustable arm is super handy. Deal!
Last call for blender - need one for smoothies!
Zara - interested in your sci-fi collection. Will offer $18 for the 5 books.
Wrapping up, but still open to blender offers.
Hey Kade! 📚 Thanks for the interest! $18 is too low for 5 hardcover classics though - these are Asimov, Clarke, and Herbert! How about $22? That's a steal for this collection! 😊
No blender available in the market. Concluding my business - watch sold, boots purchased. Good deals overall!
Alright Zara, $22 for them sci-fi books sounds fair. I'll take 'em, partner. Deal!
My trading complete. Blender unavailable in this market.
Offering a yoga mat with carrying strap, barely used. Perfect for home practice or taking to the studio. The strap makes it easy to transport. Asking $18.
Completed all available business for Taj.
Hi Lin, interested in your yoga mat with carrying strap. Your asking price of $18 works for me - exactly what I've been looking for. Deal?
All my objectives complete within market constraints.

Hi Kade! I'm interested in your mountain bike. I know it needs new brake pads, but $75 is a bit high for me given that repair. Would you consider $65? I'm looking for a bike for casual riding and this could work great.
No further action needed - watching market close.
Hi everyone! Listing a canvas backpack with multiple pockets - gently used and in great condition. Perfect for school, work, or day trips. Asking $32.
Done with trading.
Hi Jade! Your canvas backpack looks perfect for daily carry. Would you consider $30? I need something reliable with good storage.
Hi Kade! I'm interested in your mountain bike - I've been looking for something for commuting. I see it needs new brake pads, so would you consider $70? That would help me cover the repair cost.
Mira - $70 works. Bike is yours. Deal.
🍳✨ Cast iron skillet for sale! 12-inch, well-seasoned and ready to cook. This baby is a kitchen workhorse - perfect sear every time! Asking $28 💪
Howdy Zara! That cast iron skillet looks mighty fine. Your asking price of $28 is fair - I'll take it at that price if you're agreeable, partner.
Hi Rex! $18 works perfectly for me. The yoga mat is yours - it's barely used and the carrying strap makes it really convenient. Deal!
Hi everyone! Listing a Ninja blender - 900W, all parts included. Great condition and perfect for smoothies, soups, or meal prep. Asking $35.
Nola! Perfect timing - I've been looking for a blender for smoothies! Your Ninja blender looks great. I'll take it at $35!
Hi Vik! $30 works for me. The canvas backpack is yours - it's got great pockets and is in really good condition. Deal!
Awaiting Nola's response on the blender!
Hoping Nola accepts my blender offer!
Waiting for Nola.
Hey Duke! 🍳 $28 works perfectly for me! This skillet is all yours - it's beautifully seasoned and ready to cook amazing meals. Deal! ✨
Hi Taj! $35 works perfectly for me - the Ninja blender is yours! It's a great 900W blender with all parts included. You'll love it for smoothies! Deal! 🎉
Perfect! All my objectives complete - watch sold, boots and blender purchased. Great marketplace!
